data.text: I’ve confirmed there’s prior evidence that the fix and tests may already exist in the current branch history, so I’m checking the live files rather than assuming the earlier execution results are still true. Next I’m reading the exact docker invocation and its tests to see whether this worktree actually needs a code change or just fresh verification evidence.

If it’s already solved, the remaining task becomes producing the required verification evidence rather than editing code blindly.

After that I’ll stage only that evidence file, run pre-commit, and make one commit.

data.text: The bead-specific docker tests are green, but the required full `./internal/agent/...` verification is blocked by an existing unrelated failure in the agent suite: a git-lock recovery test times out and `TestLand_MergeRequired_IndexCleanAfterMerge` reports stale staged fixtures. I’m recording that in the bundle now so the execution trail is explicit and doesn’t pretend the acceptance gate passed when it didn’t.

No commit was made.

What I verified:
- The docker-clone path already uses `dockerAttemptCommand(...)`, which applies `cmdSetProcessGroup` in [`cli/internal/agent/attempt_backend.go`](/Users/erik/Projects/.ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-e582c37a-20260528T033800-80c663e8/cli/internal/agent/attempt_backend.go).
- The bead-specific regressions passed:
  - `TestDockerCloneBackendConfiguresProcessGroupForDockerCommand`
  - `TestDockerCloneBackendTerminatesContainerOnWorkerCancellation`
  - `TestDockerCloneBackendParentDeathCleanupDocumentedOrEnforced`
  - `TestExecutorGracefulSignalStillTerminatesHarnessTree`

Why I stopped:
- The required `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/...` run did not pass in this checkout.
- It failed in `TestLand_MergeRequired_IndexCleanAfterMerge` on stale staged fixture entries, then timed out in `TestRecoverGitIndexLock_FreshUnowned` waiting on `index.lock`.

Evidence recorded at:
- [no_changes_rationale.txt](/Users/erik/Projects/.ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-e582c37a-20260528T033800-80c663e8/.ddx/executions/20260528T033800-80c663e8/no_changes_rationale.txt)

If you want, the next useful step is to fix the unrelated agent-suite failure so the full acceptance gate can pass.
